title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Vijay Sales International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Vijay Sales International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vijay Sales International Enterprises! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vijay Sales International Enterprises:
Vijay Sales International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales International Enterprises!
